create_profiles.sheet_sub: Pick a character that feels like home

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Walk the path at your own pace. Each step opens the next.

companions.title: Companions
companions.subtitle: Lives of the Sahaba and the lessons they leave behind.

l1.title: The Closest Companions
l1.description: Abu Bakr, Umar, Uthman, and Ali — their first steps in faith.

l2.title: Sacrifice in Makkah
l2.description: Trials of the early believers under persecution.

l3.title: The Hijrah Generation
l3.description: Those who emigrated and those who hosted them.

l4.title: Companions of Badr
l4.description: The believers tested at the first great battle.

l5.title: The Patient Mothers
l5.description: Women among the Sahaba whose words still teach.

l6.title: Scholars Among Them
l6.description: The Sahaba who carried knowledge to the next generation.

l7.title: The Last Counsels
l7.description: Final advice from the elders of the first community.

l8.title: Their Legacy in Us
l8.description: How their lives shape practice today.

fiqh.title: Fiqh
fiqh.subtitle: Practical understanding of worship, conduct, and daily rulings.

l1.title: Foundations of Purity
l1.description: Wudu, ghusl, and the etiquettes of cleanliness.

l2.title: The Pillars of Salah
l2.description: Conditions, integrals, and what breaks the prayer.

l3.title: Zakat in Practice
l3.description: Who pays, who receives, and how to calculate.

l4.title: Fasting Through Ramadan
l4.description: Rulings, exceptions, and the heart of the fast.

l5.title: The Journey of Hajj
l5.description: Step-by-step rites of the sacred pilgrimage.

hadith.title: Hadith
hadith.subtitle: Words and ways of the Prophet ﷺ — preserved with care.

l1.title: The Forty of An-Nawawi
l1.description: Foundational hadith every seeker should know.

l2.title: On Sincerity & Intention
l2.description: Innama al-a'mal bi-n-niyyat — and what it shapes.

l3.title: Manners of the Heart
l3.description: Hadith on humility, gratitude, and patience.

l4.title: Family and Neighbors
l4.description: Rights, kindness, and the bonds we keep.

l6.title: The Path of the Knowing
l6.description: Hadith on knowledge and those who carry it.

l7.title: Closing Reflections
l7.description: Hadith on the final journey and meeting Allah.

quran.title: Quran
quran.subtitle: Reflective journeys through verses, surahs, and themes.

l1.title: Al-Fatihah Unfolded
l1.description: Meanings within the opening of the Book.

l2.title: Stories of the Prophets
l2.description: Lessons from Adam, Nuh, Ibrahim, and Musa.

l3.title: Surah Yaseen
l3.description: The heart of the Quran — verse by verse.

l4.title: Al-Mulk for Evenings
l4.description: A nightly companion and its quiet reminders.

l6.title: Al-Kahf and Patience
l6.description: Four stories, four lessons for the soul.

l7.title: Verses of Du'a
l7.description: Supplications drawn from the Book itself.

l8.title: The Final Juz
l8.description: Short surahs with weight beyond their length.

sharia.title: Sharia
sharia.subtitle: The wider path — its purposes, ethics, and gentle guidance.

l1.title: Maqasid: The Aims
l1.description: Faith, life, intellect, lineage, and wealth.

l2.title: Sources of Guidance
l2.description: Quran, Sunnah, ijma', and qiyas — at a glance.

l4.title: Justice & Public Good
l4.description: Maslaha and how rulings serve people.

l5.title: Ethics of Wealth
l5.description: Halal earnings and the spirit of trade.

l6.title: Living the Path
l6.description: Bringing principles into a modern life.

edit_profile.delete_account_description: This will permanently remove your profile, progress, and saved bookmarks. This action cannot be undone.
edit_profile.delete_confirm_subtitle: This will permanently remove your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
edit_profile.delete_password_subtitle: Enter your password to permanently delete your account.
edit_profile.delete_password_helper: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
edit_profile.change_password_subtitle: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
edit_profile.change_password_helper: Use at least 8 characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols.

help_center.title: Help & support
help_center.subtitle: We're here to listen
help_center.heading: How can we help?
help_center.lede: Tell us what's on your mind. A real person reads every message.
help_center.pick_topic_hint: Choose a topic above to start writing your message.
help_center.message_hint: Share as much detail as you'd like — we'll read every word.
help_center.send_failed: Couldn't send your message. Please try again.

feedback.label: Feedback
feedback.description: Share what you love or what could be better.

success.title: Your message is on its way
success.subtitle: Thank you for taking a moment to write to us. We'll be in touch soon.
